name: Herbed Asparagus W/Shiitakes & Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Add asparagus to a pot of boiling salted water.
2. Simmer until tender, about 1 minute. Drain and pat dry.
3. Meanwhile, remove and discard the mushroom stems; cut mushrooms into 1/4 inch strips.
4. Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Add shallots and cook, stirring frequently until golden brown.
5. Add asparagus and mushrooms to the pan; cook for 2 minutes.
6. Add herbs, salt, and pepper; cook an additional minute.
7. Transfer asparagus to oven-proof individual serving platters or a gratin dish, keeping stalks in an even row so they can be served easily.
8. Sprinkle with shiitakes. Top with Parmesan cheese.
9. Place the platter under a hot broiler until the cheese is slightly melted, about 2 minutes.
10. Serve immediately.
